svg.title: Tankly sync flow
svg.desc: How Tankly saves locally, backs up to the cloud on sign-in, and restores data on a new device.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Tankly save on my device?')
sendPrompt('What happens when I sign in with Google in Tankly?')
sendPrompt('How does Tankly check if I am on a Pro plan?')
sendPrompt('What does Firebase store for Tankly?')
sendPrompt('What does Supabase store for Tankly?')
sendPrompt('What gets restored for free Tankly users on a new device?')
sendPrompt('What gets restored for Pro Tankly users on a new device?')
sendPrompt('How seamless is switching devices in Tankly?')
